item.title: Transformice [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: Transformice [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Transformice
(Jump N Run)
Linux online version of the popular game
Transformice is an MMO Mouse Simulator platformer about dozens of mice running to bring back the cheese, trying to avoid pitfalls, leading to unexpected and hilarious situations!

You have less than two minutes to be the first mouse to bring back the cheese by all means, with the Shaman's help or curse within the multiple game modes and millions levels available: no two games are ever the same!

In this stupidly fun "free to win" game with hats, will you survive the cheese quest? Will the Shaman help or ruin everything? Join the 55 million people who already tried!
[read more]
item.description:
Transformice
(Jump N Run)
Linux online version of the popular game
Transformice is an MMO Mouse Simulator platformer about dozens of mice running to bring back the cheese, trying to avoid pitfalls, leading to unexpected and hilarious situations!

You have less than two minutes to be the first mouse to bring back the cheese by all means, with the Shaman's help or curse within the multiple game modes and millions levels available: no two games are ever the same!

In this stupidly fun "free to win" game with hats, will you survive the cheese quest? Will the Shaman help or ruin everything? Join the 55 million people who already tried!
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Transformice
(Jump N Run)
Linux online version of the popular game
Transformice is an MMO Mouse Simulator platformer about dozens of mice running to bring back the cheese, trying to avoid pitfalls, leading to unexpected and hilarious situations!

You have less than two minutes to be the first mouse to bring back the cheese by all means, with the Shaman's help or curse within the multiple game modes and millions levels available: no two games are ever the same!

In this stupidly fun "free to win" game with hats, will you survive the cheese quest? Will the Shaman help or ruin everything? Join the 55 million people who already tried!
[read more]

item.title: WholeClear Outlook PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear Outlook PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear Outlook PST Converter
(File Management)
WholeClear Outlook PST Converter is powerful software that offers a comprehensive solution for converting Outlook PST mailboxes to various file formats. The PST Mailbox Converter facilitates the conversion of Outlook PST mailboxes to multiple file formats such as EML, MSG, MBOX, EMLX, VCF, PDF, NSF, HTML, MHTML, and more. Users can efficiently migrate their emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, notes, and other mailbox items to the selected format, providing seamless data portability. The tool supports bulk conversion, allowing users to convert multiple PST mailboxes in a single operation, and ensures efficient and time-saving conversion. It accurately preserves email attributes, folder structure, attachments, metadata, and other relevant information. The software features an intuitive and user-friendly interface, making it accessible to users with varying levels of technical expertise.

[read more]
item.description:
WholeClear Outlook PST Converter
(File Management)
WholeClear Outlook PST Converter is powerful software that offers a comprehensive solution for converting Outlook PST mailboxes to various file formats. The PST Mailbox Converter facilitates the conversion of Outlook PST mailboxes to multiple file formats such as EML, MSG, MBOX, EMLX, VCF, PDF, NSF, HTML, MHTML, and more. Users can efficiently migrate their emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, notes, and other mailbox items to the selected format, providing seamless data portability. The tool supports bulk conversion, allowing users to convert multiple PST mailboxes in a single operation, and ensures efficient and time-saving conversion. It accurately preserves email attributes, folder structure, attachments, metadata, and other relevant information. The software features an intuitive and user-friendly interface, making it accessible to users with varying levels of technical expertise.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
WholeClear Outlook PST Converter
(File Management)
WholeClear Outlook PST Converter is powerful software that offers a comprehensive solution for converting Outlook PST mailboxes to various file formats. The PST Mailbox Converter facilitates the conversion of Outlook PST mailboxes to multiple file formats such as EML, MSG, MBOX, EMLX, VCF, PDF, NSF, HTML, MHTML, and more. Users can efficiently migrate their emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, notes, and other mailbox items to the selected format, providing seamless data portability. The tool supports bulk conversion, allowing users to convert multiple PST mailboxes in a single operation, and ensures efficient and time-saving conversion. It accurately preserves email attributes, folder structure, attachments, metadata, and other relevant information. The software features an intuitive and user-friendly interface, making it accessible to users with varying levels of technical expertise.

[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Files Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Files Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Files Undelete
(Utilities)
If you use different types of digital camera memory card such as SD cards, micro cards, mini cards, multimedia memory card and these cards are corrupted due to virus attack, while transferring of data if card is disconnected, sometimes due to internal problem the card become inaccessible or human error etc? Simply click on www.digitalcameraundelete.com site and download Memory Card Files Undelete application that is regain your lost or damaged mobile phone contact details, messages, images, important document etc from MMC within very less time.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Files Undelete
(Utilities)
If you use different types of digital camera memory card such as SD cards, micro cards, mini cards, multimedia memory card and these cards are corrupted due to virus attack, while transferring of data if card is disconnected, sometimes due to internal problem the card become inaccessible or human error etc? Simply click on www.digitalcameraundelete.com site and download Memory Card Files Undelete application that is regain your lost or damaged mobile phone contact details, messages, images, important document etc from MMC within very less time.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Memory Card Files Undelete
(Utilities)
If you use different types of digital camera memory card such as SD cards, micro cards, mini cards, multimedia memory card and these cards are corrupted due to virus attack, while transferring of data if card is disconnected, sometimes due to internal problem the card become inaccessible or human error etc? Simply click on www.digitalcameraundelete.com site and download Memory Card Files Undelete application that is regain your lost or damaged mobile phone contact details, messages, images, important document etc from MMC within very less time.

[read more]

item.title: Wil Editor [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Wil Editor [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: baiyqukq
item.itunes:summary:
Wil Editor
(Graphic Apps)
WIL(Wemade Image Library) editor
There is a library to parse WIL file: https://github.com/baiyqukq/libwil.git

Full features, need to accomplish:
* Cross-platform supported
* Convenient to view images
* Convenient to extract images
* Base edit functions: add, remove and replace
* Modify offset each image
* Preview frame animation
* Multi-language supported
* View color palette
* View and modify meta-data, such as title
* WIX functions, such as generate WIX file, check whether match WIX and WIL
* Efficiently deal with placeholder, such as clear all placeholders
* Import or Export other file formats(XML from Texture Packer; TSX from tiled map editor)
[read more]
item.description:
Wil Editor
(Graphic Apps)
WIL(Wemade Image Library) editor
There is a library to parse WIL file: https://github.com/baiyqukq/libwil.git

Full features, need to accomplish:
* Cross-platform supported
* Convenient to view images
* Convenient to extract images
* Base edit functions: add, remove and replace
* Modify offset each image
* Preview frame animation
* Multi-language supported
* View color palette
* View and modify meta-data, such as title
* WIX functions, such as generate WIX file, check whether match WIX and WIL
* Efficiently deal with placeholder, such as clear all placeholders
* Import or Export other file formats(XML from Texture Packer; TSX from tiled map editor)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Wil Editor
(Graphic Apps)
WIL(Wemade Image Library) editor
There is a library to parse WIL file: https://github.com/baiyqukq/libwil.git

Full features, need to accomplish:
* Cross-platform supported
* Convenient to view images
* Convenient to extract images
* Base edit functions: add, remove and replace
* Modify offset each image
* Preview frame animation
* Multi-language supported
* View color palette
* View and modify meta-data, such as title
* WIX functions, such as generate WIX file, check whether match WIX and WIL
* Efficiently deal with placeholder, such as clear all placeholders
* Import or Export other file formats(XML from Texture Packer; TSX from tiled map editor)
[read more]
